questions.question: Explain the difference between calloc() and malloc() functions with examples.
keyPoints: calloc() initializes memory to zero while malloc() does not
calloc() takes two parameters (number of elements, element size)
malloc() takes one parameter (total size in bytes)

questions.question: Explain pointer arithmetic with examples and discuss how it differs from normal arithmetic operations.
keyPoints: How adding/subtracting integers affects pointer values
Difference based on data type size
